name: ticks_increment_to_four_no_lock
description: current_hold_ticks transitions from 3 -> 4 via this tick. 4 < THRESHOLD (5), so no lock. Pins the just-below-threshold case.
derivation: dynamic_activation = max(0.4, min(3.0, 0.9)) = 0.9. threshold = 0.9 - 0.2 = 0.7. current_return (1.0) >= 0.7 -> ticks++ -> 3 + 1 = 4. 4 < 5 AND not currently_locked -> new_breakeven_locked = False. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = -0.1 (NOT floored at 0). Catches an impl that locks at >= 4 (off-by-one) or that floors unconditionally.
